---
title: "Script"
author: "David"
date: "2026-03-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(xml2)
library(stringr)
library(chromote)
```

```{r}

# Retrieve all report links

reports <- read_pc_search_pages("https://www.pc.gov.au/inquiries-and-research/?status=Completed&tab=inquiries", 13) 

known_reports <- reports[-c(2:7),]

test <- read_pc_reports(known_reports)
test_error <- read_pc_reports(reports[30,])

# Two things
# Get study report page (append submissions/)
# Get submissions page (append report/)

```



```{r}

menntaal <- read_pc_report_submissions("https://www.pc.gov.au/inquiries-and-research/water-reform-2024/submissions/")
prod <- read_pc_report_submissions("https://www.pc.gov.au/inquiries-and-research/productivity/submissions/")

```
